SEARCH

Uses of Class
sc.fiji.snt.util.TreeToRaster

Packages that use TreeToRaster
Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.util
Miscellaneous SNT utilities, including classes defining reconstruction nodes.

  • Uses of TreeToRaster in sc.fiji.snt.util

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.util that return TreeToRaster
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setAxialRes(double axialRes)
    Sets the axial (z) voxel size.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setDefaultRadius(double radius)
    Sets the default radius used for nodes/trees that have no radii defined.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setGaussianBlur(double sigma)
    Enables Gaussian blurring of the (optionally noisy) image, simulating spatially correlated noise and optical blur.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setLateralRes(double lateralRes)
    Sets the lateral (x, y) voxel size.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setPoissonNoise(double snr, double background)
    Enables Poisson shot noise on the rasterized image, simulating photon counting noise typical of fluorescence microscopy.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setRadiusScale(double scale)
    Sets a uniform multiplier applied to every node radius (and to the default radius for nodes without radii) when rasterizing.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setReferenceBounds(int width, int height, int depth)
    Sets reference bounds explicitly, so the output image matches the specified dimensions.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setReferenceBounds(ij.ImagePlus imp)
    Sets reference bounds from an ImagePlus, so the output image matches its exact dimensions.
    TreeToRaster
    TreeToRaster.setThicknessModulation(double factor)
    Enables intensity modulation based on local neurite thickness.
